title: draba aurea
intro: Draba aurea, also known as golden whitlowgrass, is a small annual plant belonging to the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Draba aurea include its ability to reduce inflammation, treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and even alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
